title: sphaerostephanos glandulosus
intro: Sphaerostephanos glandulosus, also known as the hairy shield fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The hairy shield fern has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of Sphaerostephanos glandulosus often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
